title: MT>iplus: Get with the Program! Immigration Compliance Considerations and Methodologies
content:
## MT>iplus: Get with the Program! Immigration Compliance Considerations and Methodologies
Join Sarah Adler from our Immigration Law team for a webinar that will discuss immigration compliance considerations, including:
- What information to track
- How to keep up-to-date on employee records and statuses
- How to develop analytics to assist with making business and hiring decisions, (even if you are a small company)
Note: All instructions and information on how to access the webinar will be forwarded a few days before the event.
This program qualifies for up to 1 hour of CPD credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario. Barreau du Québec Continuing Education: This program contains up to 1 hour of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec .
For questions about this event, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
- Sarah Adler Counsel People.Offices.Singular Toronto
People.Offices.Singular Toronto
- Law Society of Ontario – Substantive
- Law Society of British Columbia – Substantive
